mageGuild1.description: Visiting heroes who enter the Mage Guild can learn the spells contained within.
mageGuild1.name: Level 1 Mage Guild

mageGuild2.description: Visiting heroes who enter the Mage Guild can learn the spells contained within.
mageGuild2.name: Level 2 Mage Guild

mageGuild3.description: Visiting heroes who enter the Mage Guild can learn the spells contained within.
mageGuild3.name: Level 3 Mage Guild

mageGuild4.description: Visiting heroes who enter the Mage Guild can learn the spells contained within.
mageGuild4.name: Level 4 Mage Guild

mageGuild5.description: Visiting heroes who enter the Mage Guild can learn the spells contained within.
mageGuild5.name: Level 5 Mage Guild

tavern.name: Tavern
tavern.description: The Tavern increases the morale of the garrison.

fort.name: Fort
fort.description: The Fort provides your town with walls.

citadel.name: Citadel
citadel.description: The Citadel not only increases basic creature growth by 50%, but also strengthens the town's defenses.

castle.name: Castle
castle.description: The Castle provides 2 additional arrow towers to strengthen the town's defense and also doubles basic creature growth.

villageHall.name: Village Hall
villageHall.description: The Village Hall allows you to purchase town buildings and provides you with 500 gold per day.

townHall.name: Town Hall
townHall.description: The Town Hall allows you to purchase town buildings and provides you with 1000 gold per day.

cityHall.name: City Hall
cityHall.description: The City Hall allows you to purchase town buildings and provides you with 2000 gold per day.

capitol.name: Capitol
capitol.description: The Capitol provides you with 4000 gold per day.

marketplace.name: Marketplace
marketplace.description: The Marketplace allows you to trade resources (the more markets you have, the cheaper the rates).

resourceSilo.name: Resource Silo
resourceSilo.description: The Resource Silo provides you with 1 additional Sulfur per day.

blacksmith.description: The Blacksmith provides a Ballista to your army.
blacksmith.name: Blacksmith

special1.description: The Demon Locking Tower prevents enemies from fleeing, reduces their speed by 2 points, and spreads a radius 10 Dark Shroud.
special1.name: Demon Locking Tower

horde1.description: The Sky Pivot Pavilion increases the weekly production of White Fox Scholars by 12.
horde1.name: Sky Pivot Pavilion

horde1Upgr.description: The Sky Pivot Pavilion increases the weekly production of Red Fox Guards by 12.
horde1Upgr.name: Sky Pivot Pavilion

horde1Upgr2.description: The Sky Pivot Pavilion increases the weekly production of Golden Fox Powerhouses by 12.
horde1Upgr2.name: Sky Pivot Pavilion

special2.description: The Seven Treasures Glazed Lamp increases the Spell Power of each visiting hero by +2, and increases the mana percentage per point of Knowledge by 40% for a week.
special2.name: Seven Treasures Glazed Lamp

special3.description: The Coiling Dragon Pillar allows you to spend gold to learn four practical skills and provides +5 mana regeneration per day for visiting heroes.
special3.name: Coiling Dragon Pillar

special4.description: The Fairy Spirit Crystal grants each visiting hero the ability to fly until the end of the week.
special4.name: Fairy Spirit Crystal

special5.description: The Mystic Heaven Flame increases fire spell damage by 10% per hero level, grants +2 attack to the hero's army, and reduces spell mana cost by 1.
special5.name: Mystic Heaven Flame

special6.description: The Treasure Pavilion allows purchasing various artifacts.
special6.name: Treasure Pavilion

special7.description: The Xuanyuan Gate provides an additional 1 ore and 500 gold per day for the kingdom.
special7.name: Xuanyuan Gate

special8.description: The Yandi Gate increases the weekly creature production of this town by 100%.
special8.name: Yandi Gate

special9.description: The Medicine King Pavilion provides health regeneration (7 x level) for each visiting hero's army until the end of the week.
special9.name: Medicine King Pavilion

special10.description: The Spirit Gathering Tower increases hero morale and luck by 2 points.
special10.name: Spirit Gathering Tower

special11.description: The Flame Chi Stone Carving provides an additional 1 ore and 500 gold per day for the kingdom and enables special upgrades.
special11.name: Flame Chi Stone Carving

special12.description: The Yinglong Stone Carving provides an additional 1000 gold per day for the kingdom and increases the land movement of visiting heroes.
special12.name: Yinglong Stone Carving

special13.description: The Seven Treasures Tree provides 5000 experience to the visiting hero and increases the chance that wandering monsters encountered will join the hero's army.
special13.name: Seven Treasures Tree

grail.description: The Flame God Pillar increases weekly creature production by 50%, provides an additional 5000 gold per day for your kingdom, allows all heroes to use the highest level of fire magic, and grants all Yandi town creatures immunity to fire and a 30% health bonus.
grail.name: Flame God Pillar

dwellingLvl1.description: The Sky Fox Pavilion allows you to recruit White Fox Scholars.
dwellingLvl1.name: Sky Fox Pavilion

dwellingLvl2.description: The Barbarian Frog Palace allows you to recruit Barbarian Frogs.
dwellingLvl2.name: Barbarian Frog Palace

dwellingLvl3.description: The Imperial Immortal Palace allows you to recruit Feather Folk.
dwellingLvl3.name: Imperial Immortal Palace

dwellingLvl4.description: The Asura Field allows you to recruit Bull-headed Demons.
dwellingLvl4.name: Asura Field

dwellingLvl5.description: The Flame Demon Hall allows you to recruit Qiongqi Bears.
dwellingLvl5.name: Flame Demon Hall

dwellingLvl6.description: The Mystic Heaven Pavilion allows you to recruit Chaos Boars.
dwellingLvl6.name: Mystic Heaven Pavilion

dwellingLvl7.description: The Yandi Palace allows you to recruit Ember Earth Demons.
dwellingLvl7.name: Yandi Palace

dwellingUpLvl1.description: The Advanced Sky Fox Pavilion allows you to recruit Red Fox Guards.
dwellingUpLvl1.name: Advanced Sky Fox Pavilion

dwellingUpLvl2.description: The Advanced Barbarian Frog Palace allows you to recruit Fire Frogs.
dwellingUpLvl2.name: Advanced Barbarian Frog Palace

dwellingUpLvl3.description: The Advanced Imperial Immortal Palace allows you to recruit Feather Folk Fighters.
dwellingUpLvl3.name: Advanced Imperial Immortal Palace

dwellingUpLvl4.description: The Advanced Asura Field allows you to recruit Winged Bull-headed Demons.
dwellingUpLvl4.name: Advanced Asura Field

dwellingUpLvl5.description: The Advanced Flame Demon Hall allows you to recruit Qiongqi Giant Bears.
dwellingUpLvl5.name: Advanced Flame Demon Hall

dwellingUpLvl6.description: The Advanced Mystic Heaven Pavilion allows you to recruit Heaven-breaking Boars.
dwellingUpLvl6.name: Advanced Mystic Heaven Pavilion

dwellingUpLvl7.description: The Advanced Yandi Palace allows you to recruit Flame-burning Demons.
dwellingUpLvl7.name: Advanced Yandi Palace

dwellingUp2Lvl1.description: The Superior Sky Fox Pavilion allows you to recruit Golden Fox Powerhouses.
dwellingUp2Lvl1.name: Superior Sky Fox Pavilion

dwellingUp2Lvl2.description: The Superior Barbarian Frog Palace allows you to recruit Thorn Barbarian Frogs.
dwellingUp2Lvl2.name: Superior Barbarian Frog Palace

dwellingUp2Lvl3.description: The Superior Imperial Immortal Palace allows you to recruit Feather Folk Guardians.
dwellingUp2Lvl3.name: Superior Imperial Immortal Palace

dwellingUp2Lvl4.description: The Superior Asura Field allows you to recruit Winged Bull-headed Demon Chiefs.
dwellingUp2Lvl4.name: Superior Asura Field

dwellingUp2Lvl5.description: The Superior Flame Demon Hall allows you to recruit Qiongqi Leopards.
dwellingUp2Lvl5.name: Superior Flame Demon Hall

dwellingUp2Lvl6.description: The Superior Mystic Heaven Pavilion allows you to recruit Dark Flame Heaven-destroying Boars.
dwellingUp2Lvl6.name: Superior Mystic Heaven Pavilion

dwellingUp2Lvl7.description: The Superior Yandi Palace allows you to recruit Yandi Demons.
dwellingUp2Lvl7.name: Superior Yandi Palace
